narrative:
Liberty Local Sd (Trumbull) school district has 8,672 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 35.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 24.0 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +7.1% D−R vs +30.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
